---
title: "Replicating Axelrod's Tournament"
short-title: "Axelrod Tournament"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "A computational replication of Axelrod's 1980 iterated Prisoner's Dilemma tournament."
keywords: ["Axelrod", "tournament", "Prisoner's Dilemma", "Tit for Tat", "cooperation"]
---

# Axelrod's Tournament {#sec-axelrod-tournament}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
